description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named validate-p4c that runs daily at midnight UTC, on push to main, and on pull requests to main. The workflow has a job to validate P4C compilation of P4-16 programs in parallel with normal tests, conditional on a schedule or a pull request labeled run-validation. The job uses an ubuntu-20.04 environment, checks out the repository with submodules, uses ccache, builds with a script, and runs validation tests with ctest.
